required_skill_areas.pre_sales: Lead technical discovery and solutioning for prospects and customers.
required_skill_areas.observability: Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve technical issues in live deployments.
required_skill_areas.api_integration: You are comfortable working across APIs, SDKs, webhooks, cloud infrastructure, and customer tech stacks.

evidence.primary_role_motion: Own the end-to-end technical implementation of Deepgram’s voice AI platform for enterprise customers — from scoping and architecture through go-live and optimization.
evidence.deployment_environment: integrate our platform into the core of their operations.
evidence.target_customer_industry: You deploy Deepgram’s voice AI platform into complex restaurant environments
evidence.travel_requirement: up to 50% travel to meet with customers, support sales engagements, and participate in key onsite interactions
evidence.ai_ml_depth: You are comfortable working across APIs, SDKs, webhooks, cloud infrastructure, and customer tech stacks.
evidence.customer_engagement_depth: You embed with enterprise restaurant brands and restaurant technology partners, learn their systems deeply, and integrate our platform into the core of their operations.
evidence.target_user_persona: Embed with customer engineering teams as a trusted technical peer.
evidence.solution_customization_level: You write code, read logs, and ship fixes — you don’t just coordinate.

software_tool_familiarity.slack: you are just as comfortable on a customer’s Slack channel walking their team through an API integration.
